case_title: STOKES, RUBY PICKINGS vs. MARTIN, MARLENA et al

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

NLT 6PM 8/1/95,IF NOT PAID PLTF MAY ENFORCE WRIT W/O FURTHER NOTICE; M.MARTIN TO VACATE BY MIDNIGHT 8/31/95,IF NOT VACATED PLTF MAY ENFORCE WRIT W/O FURTHER NOTICE.
